title: TAS topology
description: How a converter's minimal simulatable circuit is assembled from CIAS bricks (the Lego layer). A tree of stages — each instantiates one CIAS brick and adds the usage the brick itself does not carry (role/why, the electrical type of each exposed terminal, and control I/O) — plus the inter-stage connections that wire the bricks' terminals to each other and to the converter's external terminals. References into a brick are stage-qualified ({stage, port} / {stage, component}), exactly as a SPICE parent references a subckt instance's nodes.

interStageConnections.description: Nets that wire stage terminals together, expose converter external terminals (Vin/Vout/GND), or magnetically couple windings across bricks.

stage.title: stage
stage.$comment: Closed variants discriminated by role (and, for control, by controlImplementation). Cascade type-signatures (power chain): lineFilter acLine→acLine; rectifier acLine→pulsatingDc; pfc pulsatingDc→dcBus; bulkStorage dcBus→dcBus; switchingCell dcBus→dcBus (non-isolated DC-DC); inverter dcBus→hfAc (owns the resonant tank for LLC/SRC, per Maksimović); isolation hfAc→hfAc[] (branch point for multi-output); outputRectifier hfAc→pulsatingDc; outputFilter pulsatingDc→dcOutput; control senses and drives the power chain (virtual = software/behavioural, physical = real controller circuitry).

powerStage.title: powerStage
powerStage.description: A single-input, single-output power-chain stage. Instantiates a CIAS brick and types its input and output terminals.

name.description: Stage instance name, unique within this topology (e.g. 'inverter', 'PFC').

role.description: Functional role of a single-output power-chain stage.

phaseCount.description: Number of interleaved physical phases sharing one logical stage and one controller. >1 only meaningful for switching stages (pfc, switchingCell, inverter).

isolationStage.title: isolationStage
isolationStage.description: The galvanic-isolation branch point (transformer brick). The only stage that may fan out to multiple typed output terminals (multi-output secondaries).

name.description: Stage instance name, unique within this topology (e.g. 'transformer').

phaseCount.description: Number of interleaved physical phases sharing one logical stage and one controller.

outputPorts.description: One or more typed output terminals (multi-output secondaries each get a binding).

virtualControl.title: virtualControl
virtualControl.description: A software / behavioural controller: it senses converter signals and drives switches LOGICALLY (no electrical circuit, no terminals). The control law may be carried by an optional model reference. Use for closed-loop simulation without modelling the controller silicon. May coexist with simulation.stimulus (open-loop): a stimulus on a switch takes precedence over a drive for that switch.

name.description: Stage instance name, unique within this topology (e.g. 'controller').

model.description: Optional name of a control-law entry in simulation.models[] (e.g. a behavioural / state-space / digital-controller model) that implements this controller.

physicalControl.title: physicalControl
physicalControl.description: A real controller circuit (controller IC + passives) as a CIAS brick, wired ELECTRICALLY into the converter via interStageConnections like any other stage. Its terminals are typed (typically 'control' for gate-drive / feedback / enable signal nets). It does NOT use logical senses/drives — the wiring is the connection.

name.description: Stage instance name, unique within this topology.

ports.description: Typed terminals of the controller brick, wired via interStageConnections (e.g. a 'control'-typed gate-drive output to a switch's exposed gate port).

circuitRef.title: circuitRef
circuitRef.description: The CIAS brick this stage instantiates: an inline CIAS document, or a URI string into a brick library (e.g. 'TAS/data/circuits.ndjson?name=half-bridge').

portBinding.title: portBinding
portBinding.description: Types one terminal of the stage's CIAS brick with its electrical role in the power chain. The direction is implied by where the binding sits (inputPort vs outputPort).

port.description: Refers to a port.name on this stage's CIAS brick.

portType.title: portType
portType.description: acLine = mains-frequency AC. pulsatingDc = rectified, unfiltered. dcBus = filtered DC (regulated or not). hfAc = switching-frequency AC (transformer or resonant tank). dcOutput = final regulated DC output. control = a signal-level net (gate drive, feedback, enable) for a physical controller.

componentSense.title: componentSense
componentSense.description: Senses a quantity at a component inside a stage's brick (e.g. a sense resistor's current, a thermistor's temperature).

stage.description: Stage instance whose brick contains the sensed component.

netSense.title: netSense
netSense.description: Senses the voltage of an inter-stage net (e.g. 'Vout' for output feedback).

net.description: Name of an interStageConnection whose voltage is sensed.

drive.title: drive
drive.description: Drives a switch or driver inside a stage's brick (the closed-loop control link). For open-loop runs the same switch can instead be driven by simulation.stimulus.

stage.description: Stage instance whose brick contains the driven component.

component.description: component.name within that stage's brick (typically a switch or driver IC).

interStageConnection.title: interStageConnection
interStageConnection.$comment: Two closed variants discriminated by kind. wire = an internal net joining stage terminals. externalPort = a net that also terminates at a converter terminal (Vin/Vout/GND). (No coupling variant: magnetic coupling lives inside a single multi-winding PEAS component, never across bricks.)

internalNet.title: internalNet
internalNet.description: An internal net joining 2+ stage terminals.

name.description: Net name, unique within this topology.

externalNet.title: externalNet
externalNet.description: A net that also terminates at an external converter terminal; its name doubles as the terminal label (Vin, Vout, GND, EN, FB).

name.description: Net name; also the external terminal label.

direction.description: Whether the converter sources, sinks, or both at this terminal.

stagePortEndpoint.title: stagePortEndpoint
stagePortEndpoint.description: References a terminal of a stage's brick: stageInstance.port.

port.description: port.name on that stage's CIAS brick.
